form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.45) at this track in a Class 2, finishing sixth and beaten 4 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and seven minors. Key player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.45) at this track in a Class 2, finishing sixth and beaten 4 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and seven minors. Key player.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by a neck at this track over 295m (17.56) beating Goodwyn in Class 1 on April 13. Was strong in the market and scored a soft win most recently. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 390m at Ascot Park. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on February 26 over 295m at this track behind Sun Strike beaten 12 lengths (18.06) in a Class 3. On best form is more than capable. Has claims.
